Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,820Chapters: 54/100Kudos: 877

entry.title: Afterglow
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,196Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 37

Summary: On the eve of a Wayne family wedding, the family celebrates love, friendship, and happily-ever-afters. While Tim and Damian prepare to begin their forever, old desires and old wounds resurface for Jason and Dick, forcing them to reexamine a love story they thought had ended years ago.

entry.title: The Games We Play
entry.summary:
Author: Katia_Earley

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,915Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 249

Summary: A truth universally acknowleged at Wayne Enterprises is that Damian Wayne hates Timothy Drake, and vice versa. Nothing more, and nothing less. However when a new job listing goes up and they both aim to clinch the position, feelings other than hate began to develope. With a set goal in mind, is this a game Damian is willing to play?

entry.title: Brother Bonding Time
entry.summary:
Author: Crystalnightterror

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,910Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 23

Summary: After receiving a message from their brother asking for help on a case Dick and Damien use this opportunity to see what’s wrong with Red Robin. Unfortunately what’s wrong is that Tim’s been corrupted into a useless set of holes. Unfortunately for them a similar fate awaits. (Who knew being converted into a mockery of who you once were and living your life as a sex slave strengthened brotherly bonds?)

Author: Mimikozyz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,177Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 45

Summary: And I know I said go slow, but I can't hold back no more Tim is a great pretender, he knows how to stay in line, to dangle over the edge, careful not to dip his feet in. Tim is not a good person, but he's good at denying, denying everything, every spark. Are you gonna be the one that's on my mind?3-6-5, all the time Grief driven Tim tried to fix things but it leaves them broken and worse. Tim doesn't let things leak, he lets it build up until it explodes, leaving everything ruined. Tim is ruining Damian.

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,159Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 257

entry.title: you're a good brother
entry.summary:
Author: DairyFarmer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 196

Summary: Dick tried talking to Jason, tried pleading. It didn’t work. Jason was angry. Angrier than Dick had ever seen him. "I knew I should've pulled the plug ages ago, I knew it's what Timmy would've wanted- you people never gave a shit about what HE wanted!" Jason looked like he wanted to spit in both their faces. ---Tim wasn't dead. It didn't matter what anyone said, he wasn't dead. Not to Dick. Or Dick loves his brother. He wants to do right by him. It doesn't land.

entry.title: miss american dream
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,415Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 294

Summary: The biting, frigid winter wind hit Tim like a freight train as he sauntered down the dark, grimy streets of Park Row. His gut told him that a snowstorm was most likely headed their way, but with Gotham’s near-constant shitty weather, it was hard to tell most of the time. He had made the foolish decision of wearing a crop top and mini skirt, only covered by a cheap faux-fur coat one of the girls gave him as a hand-me-down. It barely did anything to combat the cold temperature, but at least he looked absolutely fuckable enough for any potential customers. The only problem was that the dark streets of Park Row were empty as Tim went through his usual nightly route.  Tim had come to accept that he would rot in this sleepless city that he called home, but he didn’t think it would be so soon.After waking up from a coma with no memories intact, Timothy tries to survive by selling his body in the dark and cruel streets of Gotham City.

entry.title: Trolley Problems
entry.summary:
Author: loveyouonpurpose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,279Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 60

Summary: Damian is simply an extension of his Father's will. He knows he will never be more than his Father's Monsterous Creation. So when a portal opens up and alternate versions of Batman and Superman rescue his brothers- he is unsurprised when they see him as nothing more than a willing accomplice. OR: My take on byrambles Another Mirror but add mutual non-con!

entry.title: ‘Till your blood goes blue
entry.summary:
Author: sole_braincell

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,782Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 71

Summary: Tim is de-aged and forced to have a mission in Damian’s school to fix it. Only to find a world unknown to the Waynes.  Damian’s civllian high-school life, apparently, is nothing he or any of the Wayne’s had ever imagined. And how exactly does romancing Tim Drake factor in all this?
